size.label: Wide Shot
size.description: Full environment visible, subject small in frame.

size.label: Medium Wide Shot
size.description: Subject from knees up with environment context.

size.label: Extreme Close-Up
size.description: Tight on a single detail (eye, hand, object).

size.label: Point of View
size.description: Camera represents a character's literal viewpoint.

size.label: Over the Shoulder
size.description: Framed past one character's shoulder toward another.

angle.label: Eye Level
angle.description: Camera at subject's eye height. Neutral perspective.

angle.label: Low Angle
angle.description: Camera below subject, looking up. Conveys power or menace.

angle.label: High Angle
angle.description: Camera above subject, looking down. Conveys vulnerability.

angle.label: Dutch Angle
angle.description: Camera tilted on its roll axis. Conveys unease or disorientation.

angle.label: Bird's Eye
angle.description: Camera directly overhead. God-like or surveillance perspective.

angle.label: Worm's Eye
angle.description: Camera at ground level looking up. Extreme low angle.

lens.label: Macro Lens
lens.description: Extreme close focus for tiny details.

lens.label: Anamorphic Lens
lens.description: Widescreen with characteristic lens flares and oval bokeh.

move.label: Static
move.description: Camera is locked off. No movement.

move.label: Pan
move.description: Camera rotates horizontally on its axis.

move.label: Tilt
move.description: Camera rotates vertically on its axis.

move.label: Dolly
move.description: Camera moves toward or away from subject on a track.

move.label: Handheld
move.description: Camera is handheld. Organic, unstable feel.

move.label: Drone
move.description: Aerial camera movement. Sweeping or hovering.

light.label: Natural Light
light.description: Ambient daylight or available light. Realistic.

light.label: Film Noir
light.description: High contrast, deep shadows, hard light sources.

light.label: High Key
light.description: Bright, even lighting. Minimal shadows. Clean feel.

light.label: Golden Hour
light.description: Warm, soft directional light. Magic hour look.

light.label: Blue Hour
light.description: Cool ambient twilight. Pre-dawn or post-sunset.

light.label: Practical Lighting
light.description: Light sources visible in frame (lamps, candles, screens).

light.label: Neon
light.description: Saturated colored light. Urban, cyberpunk aesthetic.

tod.label: Continuous
tod.description: Same time as previous scene. No time jump.

dof.label: Deep Focus
dof.description: Everything in frame is sharp. Large depth of field.

dof.label: Shallow Focus
dof.description: Subject sharp, background blurred. Isolates subject.

dof.label: Rack Focus
dof.description: Focus shifts between planes during the shot.
